task_completion.description: Verify that a two-column layout is established in EdrawMax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a canvas in Wondershare EdrawMax divided into a Sidebar (approximately 1/3 of the page width) and a Main Content area (approximately 2/3 of the page width).

task_completion.description: Verify the contact information is present in the sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'jordan.smith@example.com', '(555) 012-3456', and 'San Francisco, CA' positioned in the narrower sidebar column.

task_completion.description: Verify skills are listed with visual rating shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the skills 'System Architecture', 'Python / Pandas', 'SQL & Database Design', and 'Docker / Kubernetes' in the sidebar, accompanied by graphical visual rating shapes (such as progress bars, stars, gauges, or charts) representing their respective percentages.

task_completion.description: Verify the header and profile text in the main content area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'Jordan Smith', the title 'Senior Systems Analyst', and the profile paragraph starting with 'Results-oriented analyst...' located in the wider main content column.

task_completion.description: Verify work experience and education in the main content area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the work experience entries ('TechCorp Solutions' and 'DataFlow Inc.') and the education entry ('B.S. Computer Science, University of California, Berkeley') in the main content column.

task_completion.description: Verify the files are saved and exported to the correct paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for save dialogs, export dialogs, or a file manager window showing 'jordan_smith_resume.eddx' and 'jordan_smith_resume.pdf' being saved to or existing in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to create the resume.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing active interaction with the EdrawMax interface (toolbars, canvas, menus, shape libraries) rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the files.

integrity.description: Verify that visual rating shapes are actual graphics.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual graphical shapes or charts drawn from the EdrawMax library used for the skill ratings, not just typed text characters (e.g., '====-' or '[**** ]') mimicking a bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a basic text editor or word processor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the resume is being built visually in EdrawMax and not simply typed into a basic text editor (like gedit or nano) or LibreOffice Writer to bypass the visual design requirements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are '/home/ga/Documents/jordan_smith_resume.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/jordan_smith_resume.pdf'. The resume must contain the following required strings: 'Jordan Smith', 'Senior Systems Analyst', 'jordan.smith@example.com', 'TechCorp', 'DataFlow', 'System Architecture', and 'Python'.
